data.title: Branded Legacy, Inc. undergoes management overhaul with new leadership after acquisition by Dr. Jamie Forrest.       (Characters: 107)
data.description: Today in Vancouver, British Columbia on December 10, 2025, Branded Legacy, Inc. (OTC: BLEG) revealed a significant restructuring and change of control after shareholder Dr. Jamie Forrest, PhD, MPH acquired the controlling interest in the company.

data.title: Dow sinks as year-end rally falters; Nvidia slides and Rocket Lab falls after surprise jobless claims. Warren Buffett steps down.
data.description: On Wednesday, the Dow Jones index experienced a decline following unexpected weekly jobless claims. Both Nvidia and Rocket Lab also faced drops in their stock prices. The stock market today witnessed a downturn as the year-end rally faltered. Nvidia's value plummeted as Warren Buffett announced his resignation. Live coverage of this market turmoil can be found on Investor's Business Daily. This news reflects a trend of economic uncertainty as investors react to the latest figures.

data.title: Salarius Pharmaceuticals becomes Decoy Therapeutics with Nasdaq ticker DCOY, emphasizing peptide conjugate therapeutics.
data.description: In the latest update, it has been reported that the number of confirmed COVID-19 cases has reached over 10 million worldwide, with the death toll surpassing 500,000. Despite efforts to control the spread through lockdowns and social distancing measures, some countries are experiencing a resurgence in cases, leading to concerns about a second wave of infections. Health officials are urging the public to continue following safety guidelines to prevent further outbreaks. In the meantime, researchers are working tirelessly to develop a vaccine, with several promising candidates currently in clinical trials. As the situation continues to evolve, governments and communities are adapting their strategies to mitigate the impact of the pandemic.

data.title: Dow Jones futures fall as 2025 nears end. Shopify, Eli Lilly establish new buy points, market at highs and key support.
data.description: As 2025 comes to a close, the stock market is reaching record highs with significant support levels. Companies like Shopify and Eli Lilly have established new buy points. Dow Jones Futures are showing a slight decline as we approach the final trading day of the year. This promising economic trend showcases the potential for increased investment opportunities in the coming year.

data.title: Northrim BanCorp completes $60.0 million Subordinated Notes offering to investors, due 2035.
data.description: Today, Northrim BanCorp, Inc. (NASDAQ: NRIM) based in Anchorage, Alaska, disclosed the successful conclusion of a private offering. The company has raised $60.0 million through the issuance of 6.875% Fixed-to-Floating Rate Subordinated Notes due 2035. These notes were purchased by select qualified institutional buyers and institutional accredited investors.

data.title: OTC Markets Group adds Bora Pharmaceuticals Co., Ltd. (TWSE: 6472; OTCQX: BORAY) to OTCQX. (Characters: 91)
data.description: On January 7, 2026, OTC Markets Group Inc. revealed that Bora Pharmaceuticals Co., Ltd. (TWSE: 6472; OTCQX: BORAY) has been approved to trade on the OTCQX® Best Market. OTC Markets Group Inc., the operator of regulated markets trading 12,000 U.S. and international securities, made this announcement. Bora Pharmaceuticals is a renowned international contract development and manufacturing organization and specialty pharmaceutical company. This move allows Bora Pharmaceuticals to access the OTCQX Best Market platform for trading its shares.

data.title: Magnum Ice Cream Co. (TMICC) completes €3B debut bond issuance, world's largest ice cream company.
data.description: Today, the Magnum Ice Cream Company (TMICC) has successfully completed its debut bond issuance, raising a total of €3 billion. TMICC stands as the global leading ice cream company.

data.title: Betcha found in a study of 42 US-accessible crypto casinos, only 18% had withdrawals under an hour. Jackbit stood out with 8-minute withdrawals.
data.description: In Glendale, California on November 21, 2025, Betcha, a casino review platform, shared results from its thorough analysis of fast payout casinos, investigating 42 platforms accessible in the US. The research, carried out from September to October 2025 involving $50,000 in real money deposits, uncovered that just 18% of casinos claiming "instant" or "fast" payouts truly deliver withdrawals in under one hour. Jackbit, managed by Ryker B.V, stood out as the top performer, with an average processing time of 8 minutes during various withdrawal tests supported by blockchain-verified timestamps.

data.title: Predicted: WLD could reach $0.73 by February with short-term target of $0.66 & medium-term forecast of $0.62-$0.73, breakout level $0.65, support $0.56.
data.description: Summary of WLD Price Predictions:- Short-term target within 1 week is $0.66.- Medium-term forecast for the next month falls within the range of $0.62 to $0.73.- The bullish breakout level is set at $0.65.- Critical support level stands at $0.56.

data.title: Steward Partners closes 2025 with nearly $4 billion in new assets, fueling growth and national expansion. Advised are drawn to the firm's scale and long-term partnership.
data.description: Steward Partners is experiencing a nationwide surge in advisors seeking its services for scalability, flexibility, and lasting partnerships. The employee-owned independent financial services firm, based in Stamford, Connecticut, saw this trend on January 14, 2026. Steward Partners focuses on providing comprehensive wealth management solutions to its clients.

data.title: Chegg (NYSE: CHGG) to report Q4 and full year 2025 earnings on Feb 9. Earnings call at 1:30 pm PT (4:30 pm ET).
data.description: Chegg, Inc. has disclosed that it will unveil its financial performance for the fourth quarter and full fiscal year of 2025, concluding on December 31, 2025, on February 9, 2026, after markets close. The company, listed on NYSE as CHGG, will conduct a conference call at 1:30 p.m. Pacific Time (4:30 p.m. Eastern Time) on the same day to delve into the details of the results.

data.title: RunSafe Security appoints Bob Lyle as CRO to boost global growth with 30 years of experience.
data.description: In MCLEAN, Virginia, RunSafe Security, a prominent cybersecurity firm focusing on risk identification and code protection for embedded and critical systems, has named Bob Lyle as the Chief Revenue Officer (CRO). With over 30 years of expertise in cybersecurity, software, and high-tech sectors, Lyle will steer RunSafe's worldwide revenue expansion. His primary focus will be driving adoption of the company's embedded software security platform, which includes patented technologies.

data.title: INVL Technology calls Extraordinary General Meeting on February 5, 2026.
data.description: INVL Technology, a private equity investment company with legal entity code 300893533 and registered address at Gyneju str. 14 Vilnius, Lithuania, has announced that an Extraordinary General Shareholders Meeting is scheduled to take place on February 5, 2026. This meeting has been called at the initiative and decision of the management company UAB "INVL Asset Management."

data.title: Ingrained Recovery in EASTMAN, Ga., expands equine therapy for veterans with substance use disorders and mental health challenges.
data.description: A therapy program called Ingrained Recovery in EASTMAN, Ga., has recently announced the expansion of its equine-assisted therapy program catered towards military veterans dealing with substance use disorders, trauma, and associated mental health issues. The program, initiated on Jan. 14, 2026, aims to provide specialized services to help veterans address their challenges.
